name: Fire Domain Spells
description:
Fire Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Burning Hands, Searing Smite, Flaming Sphere, Heat Metal
Tier 2: Fireball, Melf's Minute Meteors
Tier 3: Wall of Fire, Fire Shield
Tier 4: Flame Strike, Conjure Elemental (Fire only - rework)
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
